# 904 Dumpster

> Locally-owned roll-off dumpster rental and junk removal service in Jacksonville and Northeast Florida from $299. Same-day delivery, flat-rate pricing, and 10, 15, and 20-yard containers for home cleanouts, renovations, construction, and demolition.

## Company overview

904 Dumpster is a locally-owned, licensed franchise hauler based in Jacksonville, FL. The company provides roll-off dumpster rentals, junk removal, and demolition services across Northeast Florida. Service area covers Duval, Clay, St. Johns, and Nassau counties. Standard rentals include delivery, pickup, disposal fees, and a defined rental period at one flat rate. Customers are primarily homeowners managing renovations and cleanouts, contractors handling roofing and construction debris, property managers handling estate or tenant turnover, and commercial businesses needing scheduled or one-off waste removal.

Licensed and insured. Operates as a franchise hauler in Clay County and serves municipalities throughout Northeast Florida.

## Pricing

Pricing starts at $299 for the smallest container. All quoted prices include delivery, pickup, disposal at a licensed transfer station or landfill, and the standard rental period. There are no hidden fees. Additional charges may apply for: rental period extensions, overage tonnage beyond the included weight allowance, and prohibited items found in the load.

URL: https://www.904dumpster.com/dumpster-rental-pricing-jacksonville

## Dumpster sizes

### 10-yard dumpster
Dimensions roughly 12 ft long by 8 ft wide by 3.5 ft tall. Holds approximately 3 pickup truck loads of debris. Best fit for: small bathroom renovations, single-room cleanouts, garage decluttering, roofing projects under 1,500 sq ft, small landscaping jobs. Fits in most residential driveways.

URL: https://www.904dumpster.com/10-yard-dumpster-rental

### 15-yard dumpster
Mid-size container suited for medium-sized projects. Holds approximately 4.5 pickup truck loads. Best fit for: kitchen renovations, garage cleanouts with bulky items, mid-size roofing projects, basement cleanouts, moderate landscaping debris.

URL: https://www.904dumpster.com/15-yard-dumpster-rental

### 20-yard dumpster
Larger container for major projects. Holds approximately 6 pickup truck loads. Best fit for: whole-house cleanouts, major renovations, larger roofing tear-offs, estate cleanouts, deck or fence removal projects, large construction debris jobs.

URL: https://www.904dumpster.com/20-yard-dumpster-rental

### Size selection
For projects mixing debris types, sizing up by one is typically more economical than ordering two of a smaller size. The size guide walks through estimation by project type, room count, and material weight considerations such as concrete or roofing shingles.

URL: https://www.904dumpster.com/dumpster-size-guide

## Service types

### Residential dumpster rental
For homeowners. Common projects include spring cleaning, garage cleanouts, attic and basement decluttering, estate cleanouts after a move or loss, moving prep, and yard waste cleanup after storms. Driveway-friendly placement available.

URL: https://www.904dumpster.com/residential-dumpster-rental-jacksonville-fl

### Commercial dumpster rental
For businesses, retail, office, and light industrial. Supports recurring or one-time waste removal. Containers can be placed on commercial lots, behind buildings, or in scheduled service rotations.

URL: https://www.904dumpster.com/commercial-dumpster-rental-jacksonville-fl

### Construction dumpster rental
For contractors, roofers, remodelers, and builders. Handles construction and demolition debris including drywall, lumber, shingles, siding, fixtures, and general jobsite waste. Heavy-material loads require appropriate size selection.

URL: https://www.904dumpster.com/construction-dumpster-rental-jacksonville-fl

### Junk removal
Full-service hauling where the crew loads the truck. Best for properties without space for a roll-off, single-trip cleanouts, or projects where customers do not want to handle the loading.

URL: https://www.904dumpster.com/junk-removal-jacksonville-fl

### Demolition services
Partial-structure demolition: sheds, decks, fences, and small detached structures. Combined service that handles teardown and disposal in one engagement.

URL: https://www.904dumpster.com/demolition-services-jacksonville-fl

### Concrete disposal
Heavy-material containers specifically rated for concrete, brick, masonry, and similar dense materials. Standard dumpsters have weight limits that concrete projects can exceed quickly, so dedicated containers are sized accordingly.

URL: https://www.904dumpster.com/concrete-disposal-dumpster-jacksonville-fl

Service area overview: https://www.904dumpster.com/locations

## Prohibited items

Florida law and licensed-hauler regulations restrict the items that may be placed in roll-off containers. Restricted categories typically include: hazardous chemicals and household hazardous waste, paint and solvents, batteries, tires, refrigerants and appliances containing them, asbestos-containing materials, medical waste, and certain electronics. The prohibited items list page maintains the full enumeration.

URL: https://www.904dumpster.com/rules/prohibited-items-list

## Permits

Dumpsters placed on private property such as a residential driveway typically do not require a permit. Placement on public right-of-way, including most streets and curbs in Jacksonville and surrounding cities, requires a permit from the local jurisdiction. The Jacksonville permit guide details when permits apply and the application steps.

URL: https://www.904dumpster.com/blog/jacksonville-dumpster-permit-guide
